stream_name: Synthetic Lethality Engine — contracts, fuser, tiers, RS, invariants

audit_method.extraction: verbatim needle lookup (find_verbatim) for every high-stakes claim; every entity's source_receipts includes sha256 for downstream re-verification.
audit_method.verbatim_policy: verbatim_evidence[].found=false ⇒ the literal string is not in the current file (roadmap drift or version skew); NOT counted as evidence.

entities.name: PatientState
entities.what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references PatientState.
entities.how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['somatic_mutations', 'germline_variants', 'tumor_type', 'biomarkers', 'prior_therapies']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
entities.why_it_exists: Single source of truth for patient input. Everything downstream reads from PatientState so no engine forages raw EHR fields.

entities.name: SomaticMutation
entities.what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references SomaticMutation.
entities.how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['gene', 'hgvs_p', 'consequence', 'allele_frequency', 'zygosity']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
entities.why_it_exists: Typed representation prevents an engine from silently accepting free-text mutation notes.

entities.name: CaseResolution
entities.what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references CaseResolution.
entities.how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['patient_state', 'axis_results', 'ranked_interventions', 'audit_trail', 'ruo', 'disclaimer']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
entities.why_it_exists: Immutable snapshot returned by the orchestrator; every response carries the audit trail and RUO flag.

entities.name: RankedIntervention
entities.what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references RankedIntervention.
entities.how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['axis', 'tier', 'score', 'modality_evidence', 'promotion_source', 'confidence_notes']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
entities.why_it_exists: Per-axis ranked output with tier assignment plus provenance for how the tier was reached.

entities.name: RSFeatureSet
entities.what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references RSFeatureSet.
entities.how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['CCNE1_amplified', 'ARID1A_LOF', 'MYC_amplified', 'MSI_H', 'TP53_LOF', 'MBD4_LOF', 'rs_score', 'rs_class']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
entities.why_it_exists: 6 binary features + composite RS score; single point of truth for replication-stress phenotyping.

entities.name: Synthetic Lethality Engine
entities.what_it_solves: Given a PatientState, evaluates each of 8 CandidateAxis dependencies and returns tier-assigned, evidence-fused RankedIntervention list.
entities.how_it_solves: Sub-modules: core/ (axis dispatch + tier logic), multimodal/ (7-modality fuser), kb/ (curated evidence loaded read-only), audit/ (AuditEntry per tier assignment), api/ (thin HTTP surface). Called from the Orchestrator at Phase 3.5.
entities.why_it_exists: Every axis dependency previously had scattered, ad-hoc logic; the engine consolidates fusion + tiering + provenance in one testable module with strict boundaries.

entities.name: Case Resolution Orchestrator (12-engine pipeline, SL is Phase 3.5)
entities.what_it_solves: Top-level pipeline that composes the 12 engines into a single CaseResolution.
entities.how_it_solves: `Orchestrator.resolve_case(patient_state) -> CaseResolution` sequences the engines; SL runs as Phase 3.5 after upstream biomarker + mechanism engines have populated the state.
entities.why_it_exists: Single choke-point for cross-cutting concerns: audit trail, RUO middleware, tier clamps, POLE guard, underpowered guard.

entities.name: PARP_INHIBITORS
entities.what_it_solves: CandidateAxis enum member — evaluated per-patient by the SL engine.
entities.how_it_solves: Fed through modality_fuser + tier_assign; if is_rs_sensitive=True and RS score ≥ 0.40, apply_rs_promotion() may lift MECHANISTIC→STRONG when independent evidence exists.
entities.why_it_exists: HRD-context targets; not RS-sensitive by roadmap definition.

entities.name: CYTIDINE_ANALOGS
entities.what_it_solves: CandidateAxis enum member — evaluated per-patient by the SL engine.
entities.how_it_solves: Fed through modality_fuser + tier_assign; if is_rs_sensitive=True and RS score ≥ 0.40, apply_rs_promotion() may lift MECHANISTIC→STRONG when independent evidence exists.
entities.why_it_exists: MBD4 x cytidine analog axis — VALIDATED tier per roadmap for ovarian context.

entities.name: ATR_WEE1
entities.what_it_solves: CandidateAxis enum member — evaluated per-patient by the SL engine.
entities.how_it_solves: Fed through modality_fuser + tier_assign; if is_rs_sensitive=True and RS score ≥ 0.40, apply_rs_promotion() may lift MECHANISTIC→STRONG when independent evidence exists.
entities.why_it_exists: Replication-stress checkpoint; canonical RS-sensitive axis.

entities.name: CCNE1_AMP
entities.what_it_solves: CandidateAxis enum member — evaluated per-patient by the SL engine.
entities.how_it_solves: Fed through modality_fuser + tier_assign; if is_rs_sensitive=True and RS score ≥ 0.40, apply_rs_promotion() may lift MECHANISTIC→STRONG when independent evidence exists.
entities.why_it_exists: CCNE1 amp → RS phenotype → checkpoint dependency.

entities.name: PKMYT1
entities.what_it_solves: CandidateAxis enum member — evaluated per-patient by the SL engine.
entities.how_it_solves: Fed through modality_fuser + tier_assign; if is_rs_sensitive=True and RS score ≥ 0.40, apply_rs_promotion() may lift MECHANISTIC→STRONG when independent evidence exists.
entities.why_it_exists: Wee1-related mitotic checkpoint dependency.

entities.name: TP53_REPLICATION_STRESS
entities.what_it_solves: CandidateAxis enum member — evaluated per-patient by the SL engine.
entities.how_it_solves: Fed through modality_fuser + tier_assign; if is_rs_sensitive=True and RS score ≥ 0.40, apply_rs_promotion() may lift MECHANISTIC→STRONG when independent evidence exists.
entities.why_it_exists: TP53-LOF driven RS.

entities.name: WRN
entities.what_it_solves: CandidateAxis enum member — evaluated per-patient by the SL engine.
entities.how_it_solves: Fed through modality_fuser + tier_assign; if is_rs_sensitive=True and RS score ≥ 0.40, apply_rs_promotion() may lift MECHANISTIC→STRONG when independent evidence exists.
entities.why_it_exists: MSI-H specific WRN dependency.

entities.name: IMMUNOTHERAPY
entities.what_it_solves: CandidateAxis enum member — evaluated per-patient by the SL engine.
entities.how_it_solves: Fed through modality_fuser + tier_assign; if is_rs_sensitive=True and RS score ≥ 0.40, apply_rs_promotion() may lift MECHANISTIC→STRONG when independent evidence exists.
entities.why_it_exists: IO axis included for tier-fusion completeness; not RS-sensitive.

entities.name: VALIDATED
entities.what_it_solves: Tier 'VALIDATED' in the 4-level SL evidence hierarchy.
entities.how_it_solves: Never auto-assigned by the fuser; only reachable via source == 'frozen_receipt' (invariant #1).
entities.why_it_exists: Prevents the pipeline from claiming clinical-grade evidence without an explicit, human-owned frozen receipt.

attributes.entry_criterion: Highest tier. Score ≥ 10 AND clinical == POSITIVE.

entities.name: STRONG
entities.what_it_solves: Tier 'STRONG' in the 4-level SL evidence hierarchy.
entities.how_it_solves: Reachable by modality fuser OR by rs_promotion() when RS_high and independent evidence.
entities.why_it_exists: Threshold captures 'multiple independent lines of positive evidence' without demanding clinical readouts.

entities.name: MECHANISTIC
entities.what_it_solves: Tier 'MECHANISTIC' in the 4-level SL evidence hierarchy.
entities.how_it_solves: Default fallback when only mechanistic reasoning or a single low-weight modality supports the axis.
entities.why_it_exists: Explicitly under-claims: signals interest without pretending to have fusion power.

entities.name: NOT_SUPPORTED / INSUFFICIENT
entities.what_it_solves: Tier 'NOT_SUPPORTED / INSUFFICIENT' in the 4-level SL evidence hierarchy.
entities.how_it_solves: Terminal 'refuse to recommend' state.
entities.why_it_exists: Failure closed: the SL engine returns absence-of-evidence explicitly rather than surfacing a low-confidence recommendation.

entities.name: clinical
entities.what_it_solves: Evidence modality 'clinical' consumed by the multimodal fuser.
entities.how_it_solves: Contributes weight 4 to the fused score. Positive/negative/null verdicts are aggregated with signed contributions.
entities.why_it_exists: Weights are hard-coded to reflect scientific hierarchy — clinical evidence dominates cell-line signals; CRISPR + expression are supporting only.

entities.name: in_vivo
entities.what_it_solves: Evidence modality 'in_vivo' consumed by the multimodal fuser.
entities.how_it_solves: Contributes weight 3 to the fused score. Positive/negative/null verdicts are aggregated with signed contributions.
entities.why_it_exists: Weights are hard-coded to reflect scientific hierarchy — clinical evidence dominates cell-line signals; CRISPR + expression are supporting only.

entities.name: in_vitro
entities.what_it_solves: Evidence modality 'in_vitro' consumed by the multimodal fuser.
entities.how_it_solves: Contributes weight 2 to the fused score. Positive/negative/null verdicts are aggregated with signed contributions.
entities.why_it_exists: Weights are hard-coded to reflect scientific hierarchy — clinical evidence dominates cell-line signals; CRISPR + expression are supporting only.

entities.name: prism
entities.what_it_solves: Evidence modality 'prism' consumed by the multimodal fuser.
entities.how_it_solves: Contributes weight 2 to the fused score. Positive/negative/null verdicts are aggregated with signed contributions.
entities.why_it_exists: Weights are hard-coded to reflect scientific hierarchy — clinical evidence dominates cell-line signals; CRISPR + expression are supporting only.

entities.name: gdsc
entities.what_it_solves: Evidence modality 'gdsc' consumed by the multimodal fuser.
entities.how_it_solves: Contributes weight 2 to the fused score. Positive/negative/null verdicts are aggregated with signed contributions.
entities.why_it_exists: Weights are hard-coded to reflect scientific hierarchy — clinical evidence dominates cell-line signals; CRISPR + expression are supporting only.

entities.name: expression
entities.what_it_solves: Evidence modality 'expression' consumed by the multimodal fuser.
entities.how_it_solves: Contributes weight 1 to the fused score. Positive/negative/null verdicts are aggregated with signed contributions.
entities.why_it_exists: Weights are hard-coded to reflect scientific hierarchy — clinical evidence dominates cell-line signals; CRISPR + expression are supporting only.

entities.name: crispr
entities.what_it_solves: Evidence modality 'crispr' consumed by the multimodal fuser.
entities.how_it_solves: Contributes weight 1 to the fused score. Positive/negative/null verdicts are aggregated with signed contributions.
entities.why_it_exists: Weights are hard-coded to reflect scientific hierarchy — clinical evidence dominates cell-line signals; CRISPR + expression are supporting only.

entities.name: Multimodal Fuser
entities.what_it_solves: Computes the fused evidence score per (patient, axis) that the tier logic consumes.
entities.how_it_solves: Sums signed weight contributions across 7 modalities. Positive verdict → +weight, negative → -weight, null → 0. Distinct positive sources are counted for the STRONG threshold (≥ 2 distinct positives).
entities.why_it_exists: Encodes 'scientific hierarchy' explicitly: a positive clinical signal outweighs three positive CRISPR hits; cell-line data cannot override clinical.

entities.name: Replication Stress (RS) Framework
entities.what_it_solves: Composite RS_score built from 6 binary features that classifies a tumor as RS_high / RS_med / RS_low.
entities.how_it_solves: rs_score = sum(feature_weight if feature else 0). Bands: high ≥ 0.40, medium ≥ 0.20, low < 0.20. RS_high tumors are eligible for rs_promotion on RS-sensitive axes.
entities.why_it_exists: Encodes 'this tumor has enough replication stress to make checkpoint inhibition rational' as a first-class, per-patient feature — instead of scattering CCNE1/MYC/TP53 checks across engines.

entities.name: RS-based Tier Promotion
entities.what_it_solves: Lifts MECHANISTIC axis results to STRONG when the tumor is RS_high AND the axis is RS-sensitive AND independent evidence exists.
entities.how_it_solves: See attributes.code_verbatim — canonical function from CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP Ch 3 with explicit early-exits at every guard.
entities.why_it_exists: Encodes the domain claim 'in a high-replication-stress background, a mechanistic hint on an RS-sensitive checkpoint is worth more'. Guards prevent it from over-writing VALIDATED / STRONG or from firing on non-RS axes.

entities.name: VALIDATED never auto-assigned
entities.what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'VALIDATED never auto-assigned'
entities.how_it_solves: Fuser code refuses to output tier=VALIDATED. Only source == 'frozen_receipt' assignments can reach VALIDATED.
entities.why_it_exists: Blocks the pipeline from ever claiming clinical-grade evidence without a signed frozen receipt.

entities.name: Tier clamp: max STRONG without clinical POSITIVE
entities.what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'Tier clamp: max STRONG without clinical POSITIVE'
entities.how_it_solves: Post-fuser clamp: if no modality with weight==4 (clinical) returned POSITIVE, final tier is capped at STRONG.
entities.why_it_exists: Prevents 'STRONG cell-line + STRONG in-vivo → VALIDATED' short-circuits.

entities.name: Receipt immutability (deepcopy on read)
entities.what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'Receipt immutability (deepcopy on read)'
entities.how_it_solves: All frozen-receipt reads deepcopy the KB row before returning to the caller.
entities.why_it_exists: Downstream mutation of a receipt can never propagate back into the KB or into other axes' results.

entities.name: KB read-only direction
entities.what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'KB read-only direction'
entities.how_it_solves: Engines have read handles into the KB; write access is confined to admin ingestion scripts, not the API pipeline.
entities.why_it_exists: Blocks accidental production writes from a live case resolution.

entities.name: POLE guard (POLE hotspot → msi_h=False)
entities.what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'POLE guard (POLE hotspot → msi_h=False)'
entities.how_it_solves: If a canonical POLE hotspot mutation is detected in PatientState, RSFeatureSet.MSI_H is forced to False regardless of upstream flags.
entities.why_it_exists: POLE-mutant hypermutation has been misclassified as MSI-H in upstream tools; this guard prevents WRN axis being triggered on a POLE-only case.

entities.name: RUO on all responses
entities.what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'RUO on all responses'
entities.how_it_solves: Every CaseResolution response is wrapped by RUO middleware: ruo=True + disclaimer='Research use only...'
entities.why_it_exists: Non-negotiable regulatory posture — no clinician-facing output ever ships without the RUO badge.

entities.name: AuditEntry per tier assignment
entities.what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'AuditEntry per tier assignment'
entities.how_it_solves: Each RankedIntervention has an AuditEntry recording tier, source, promotion_source, and the exact modality contributions.
entities.why_it_exists: Full traceability: given a response, you can reconstruct why an axis got the tier it did.

entities.name: Underpowered guard (n_mut < 15 → PromotionBlockedError)
entities.what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'Underpowered guard (n_mut < 15 → PromotionBlockedError)'
entities.how_it_solves: If the reference cohort for a promotion decision has n < 15, apply_rs_promotion raises PromotionBlockedError instead of promoting.
entities.why_it_exists: Stops the fuser from claiming 'STRONG (rs_promotion)' when the underlying cohort is statistically underpowered.

entities.name: MBD4 × cytidine tier fix
entities.what_it_solves: Sprint 4S closed gap: MBD4 × cytidine tier fix
entities.how_it_solves: Tier assignment for MBD4/cytidine axis was demoted to correct level; VALIDATED entry constrained to frozen_receipt.
entities.why_it_exists: Prior sprints shipped the SL engine without these hardening rules; Sprint 4S closed the identified holes.

source_receipts.span_extracted: Ch 3.5 — Sprint 4S closed gaps at commit 474b812

entities.name: RS score wiring
entities.what_it_solves: Sprint 4S closed gap: RS score wiring
entities.how_it_solves: RSFeatureSet fully wired into apply_rs_promotion; RS_score becomes a first-class field on CaseResolution.
entities.why_it_exists: Prior sprints shipped the SL engine without these hardening rules; Sprint 4S closed the identified holes.

source_receipts.span_extracted: Ch 3.5 — Sprint 4S closed gaps at commit 474b812

entities.name: VALIDATED guard
entities.what_it_solves: Sprint 4S closed gap: VALIDATED guard
entities.how_it_solves: Fuser hard-refuses to emit VALIDATED (invariant #1) — was previously reachable via score arithmetic alone.
entities.why_it_exists: Prior sprints shipped the SL engine without these hardening rules; Sprint 4S closed the identified holes.

source_receipts.span_extracted: Ch 3.5 — Sprint 4S closed gaps at commit 474b812

entities.name: POLE guard
entities.what_it_solves: Sprint 4S closed gap: POLE guard
entities.how_it_solves: POLE hotspot forces MSI_H=False (invariant #5) — was previously letting WRN axis fire on POLE-only cases.
entities.why_it_exists: Prior sprints shipped the SL engine without these hardening rules; Sprint 4S closed the identified holes.

source_receipts.span_extracted: Ch 3.5 — Sprint 4S closed gaps at commit 474b812

entities.name: RUO middleware
entities.what_it_solves: Sprint 4S closed gap: RUO middleware
entities.how_it_solves: RUO=True + disclaimer stamped on every response (invariant #6) — was previously optional at route level.
entities.why_it_exists: Prior sprints shipped the SL engine without these hardening rules; Sprint 4S closed the identified holes.

source_receipts.span_extracted: Ch 3.5 — Sprint 4S closed gaps at commit 474b812

entities.name: Agent conduct audit 2026-06-06
entities.what_it_solves: External audit of the SL API's conduct against the invariants (RUO stamping, tier assignments, promotion source tags).
entities.how_it_solves: See agent_conduct_audit_2026-06-06.json for structured pass/fail per invariant.
entities.why_it_exists: Independent confirmation that the code path enforces the roadmap invariants at request time (not just in unit tests).

entities.name: Gap exploit prompts + API verification
entities.what_it_solves: Adversarial prompt suite designed to trip each invariant, plus the API verification JSON showing what actually happened.
entities.how_it_solves: GAP_EXPLOIT_PROMPTS.md enumerates the exploits; gap_exploit_api_verification.json is the machine-readable outcome per prompt.
entities.why_it_exists: Turns invariants into executable red-team assets — an invariant with no adversarial test is not a real invariant.

entities.name: SL audit — all commits (v2)
entities.what_it_solves: Per-commit audit of the SL engine repo history, capturing which invariants each commit introduced/regressed.
entities.how_it_solves: agent_full_audit_all_commits_v2.json records commit → invariant coverage; crispro_sl_audit_findings.json is the summarised findings register.
entities.why_it_exists: Answers 'when did each invariant become real?' — used to justify claims about Sprint 4S closure at commit 474b812.

entities.name: Flag remediation memo
entities.what_it_solves: Living memo enumerating flags raised by audits and their remediation status.
entities.how_it_solves: FLAG_REMEDIATION_MEMO.md tracks each flag → owner → status → target commit.
entities.why_it_exists: Central inbox for audit findings so no flag is silently absorbed without a written disposition.

entities.name: Lineage Dependency Engine (PLANNED, Sprint C)
entities.what_it_solves: Second Layer-1 engine that will score tissue-lineage-specific dependencies as a peer to synthetic lethality.
entities.how_it_solves: Not yet implemented; roadmap Sprint C reserves the module path and contract slot.
entities.why_it_exists: Some axes (e.g. WRN, RB1-cyclin dependencies) are better framed lineage-first than SL-first — this engine will carry that logic separately from the SL fuser.
gaps_still_open: Not built. No code path exists in crispro-backend-v3 as of roadmap snapshot.

gaps_still_open_stream_level: Lineage Dependency Engine — PLANNED, not implemented.
Any invariant whose verbatim needle returned found=false should be re-verified against the live crispro-backend-v3 source (roadmap may lag repo).
cross_stream_refs: See stream_evidence.json for canonical receipts (MBD4/ATR) that live outputs are compared against.
See stream_moat.json for governance decisions (PATH A) and 8D remediation status that intersect with invariants.
